title: Elevance Health Executive: Committed to Affordability
description: Catherine Gaffigan, president of health solutions at Elevance Health, says utilization is a key driver of rising health care costs. She tells Romaine Bostick and Kristine Aquino on The Close that factors include an aging population and higher pharmaceutical and hospital expenses. (Source: Bloomberg)
